parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets clk and rst logic threshold

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic rising-edge sampled piecewise limiting behavior.
Do not hard-code validation timing or use simulator-specific side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: Initialization sets out to 0.45 V and metric to 0 V; an active-high reset sampled on a rising clk crossing restores the same state.
For sampled input deviation from -0.09 V through 0.09 V, out equals 0.45 V plus 1.7 times the deviation and metric is 0 V.
Above the positive boundary, out follows 0.73 V plus 0.45 times excess deviation and metric is 0.85 V.
Below the negative boundary, out follows 0.17 V plus 0.45 times excess negative deviation and metric is 0.85 V.
The final held output remains within 0.04 V through 0.86 V.
Out and metric update only on rising clock crossings and hold between samples.

title: Limiting Amplifier Frontend
